notes: environment_selector.rs:171 — GenericMenuItem::name() menu label, UI -> translate '新建环境'. llms.rs:1344 — LLMInfo.description, '{}' fills with endpoint.name (custom endpoint name, untranslatable); '·' separator + {} preserved -> '自定义 · {}'. ai_page.rs:6990 — fn search_terms() on CloudHandoffWidget -> bilingual append, kept English verbatim incl '&', added 云/切换/移交/自动/睡眠/休眠/与号/移至/本地 lowercase no-punct. teams_page.rs:2031 — cta_sentence UI string -> translate (formal 您 register, full-width 。). teams_page.rs:2738 — render_subsubsection_header 'By link' subsection header -> '通过链接'. teams_page.rs:2080 — CTA button label 'Update billing' -> '更新账单' (imperative, no trailing punct). teams_page.rs:2942 — count_label singular branch ('1 team member') vs format!('{count} team members') -> '1 名团队成员'. cli_agent.rs:500 — build_diff_hunk_prompt: text sent to CLI agent PTY / rich input (view.rs:22463 try_send_text_to_cli_agent_or_rich_input), user-visible prompt not telemetry/panic; preserved all {placeholder} location fields and (+{} -{}) stats and `git diff` identifier, translated only trailing instruction sentence, '--' -> '——'.
